_note: Reviewed filename→slot map for bulk video staging (PRD-WAVE-CONTENT-OPS). Each downloaded NotebookLM video (one ~7-min per module, in docs/roadmap order) maps to that module's MAIN slot (v-mN-1 for skills tracks, v-dN-1 for exam tracks). Deep-dive (v-*-2) and overview (v-ov-*) slots stay placeholder until those are produced. `source` is relative to the platform root (this repo's parent). scripts/stage-media.mjs consumes this.
